---
title: "Quarto 2"
author: "Var Kurapati"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

```{r}
ggplot(data = mpg, mapping = aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = class)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Engine Displacement vs. Highway MPG",
    x = "Engine Displacement (L)",
    y = "Highway Miles per Gallon",
    color = "Car Class"
  )
```
